title: trollius bhotanicus
intro: Trollius bhotanicus, also known as Globe Flower or Troll's Flower, is a perennial flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health, and is also used to treat conditions like bronchitis and coughs. Trollius bhotanicus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional remedies for its antiseptic and antimicrobial properties.
